title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
pattern: Array â€” Single Pass Min Tracking
coreIdea: Maximize profit from a single buy-sell transaction by tracking the minimum price seen so far while scanning left to right, and computing potential profit at each step against that minimum.
recognitionCues: single buy and single sell allowed
asks for max profit from a price array
approach: Track min_price as infinity and max_profit as 0. For each price, update max_profit = max(max_profit, price - min_price), then update min_price = min(min_price, price).
